package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadPerRecordDebugLogInBatch() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_record_debug_log_in_batch"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag debug logging per batch record on hot ingestion paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
